enabled.description: Master on/off. When false the module's endpoints return 404.

minTextLen.description: Minimum length (in code points) of a review body. Clamped to [0, maxTextLen].
minTextLen.$comment: At runtime resolveSettings() additionally clamps minTextLen to <= the effective maxTextLen, so the two bounds can never invert and reject every body even if an admin sets minTextLen above maxTextLen.

maxTextLen.description: Maximum length (in code points) of a review body. Bounded by a hard cap.

autoApprove.description: When true a newly submitted review is stored 'approved' (public immediately) instead of 'pending' moderation.
